'''hazugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enadoline|enadoline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enadoline|enadoline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hazugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzigith|hæzigith]] || [[word:hæzigij|hæzigij]] || [[word:hæzigish|hæzigish]] || [[word:hæzigi|hæzigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazuzuguth|hazuzuguth]] || [[word:hazuzuguj|hazuzuguj]] || [[word:hazuzugush|hazuzugush]] || [[word:hazuzugu|hazuzugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazuguth|hazuguth]] || [[word:hazuguj|hazuguj]] || [[word:hazugush|hazugush]] || [[word:hazugu|hazugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazufgufth|hazufgufth]] || [[word:hazufgufj|hazufgufj]] || [[word:hazufgufsh|hazufgufsh]] || [[word:hazufguf|hazufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazuguthu|hazuguthu]] || [[word:hazuguju|hazuguju]] || [[word:hazugushu|hazugushu]] || [[word:hazuguku|hazuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazuguth|hazuguth]] || [[word:hazuguj|hazuguj]] || [[word:hazugush|hazugush]] || [[word:hazugu|hazugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazuguthul|hazuguthul]] || [[word:hazugujul|hazugujul]] || [[word:hazugushul|hazugushul]] || [[word:hazugukul|hazugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazuguuthuthu|hazuguuthuthu]] || [[word:hazuguujuju|hazuguujuju]] || [[word:hazuguushushu|hazuguushushu]] || [[word:hazuguuku|hazuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazuguthun|hazuguthun]] || [[word:hazugujun|hazugujun]] || [[word:hazugushun|hazugushun]] || [[word:hazugukun|hazugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazuguthuoro|hazuguthuoro]] || [[word:hazugujuoro|hazugujuoro]] || [[word:hazugushuoro|hazugushuoro]] || [[word:hazugukuoro|hazugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
